message.content:
#set page(margin: 1in)
#set text(font: "New Computer Modern", size: 11pt)

#align(center, [
  #text(size: 1.5em, weight: "bold")[Inline and Display Mathematics] \
  Source-backed grouped formula sample \
  #v(1em)
])

= Expressions

*Expression 1.* The following expression is taken from a source-backed formula corpus.

$ cal(L) = 1/4 (F_(mu nu)^a)^2 + overline(psi)_mu^i [D slash^(i j) psi_mu^j - 1/2 gamma_alpha D_mu^(i j) psi_alpha^j - 1/2 gamma_mu D_alpha^(i j) psi_alpha^j + 3/8 gamma_mu D slash^(i j) gamma_alpha psi_alpha] $

*Expression 2.* The following expression is taken from a source-backed formula corpus.

$ cal(I)(delta) = inf_(lambda in RR^2_+) { angle.l lambda, delta angle.r + cal(I)^star(lambda) } = inf_(lambda in RR^2_+) { angle.l lambda, delta angle.r + sup_(gamma in Pi(mu_1, mu_2)) integral_(cal(V)) f_lambda(v) dif gamma(v) } $

*Expression 3.* The following expression is taken from a source-backed formula corpus.

$ biggl( phi_1(x), mat(phi_2(x); phi_3(x)), mat(phi_4(x); phi_5(x)) biggr) arrow biggl( c dot e^(lambda x) phi_1(x), U mat(e^(-lambda' x) phi_2(x); e^(-lambda' x) phi_3(x)), V mat(e^(lambda'' x) phi_4(x); e^(lambda'' x) phi_5(x)) biggr) $

*Expression 4.* The following expression is taken from a source-backed formula corpus.

$ (partial L) / (partial w_(i j k l)) (g_(i j), g_(i j, k), g_(i j, k l)) = (partial x^i) / (partial tilde(x)^a) (partial x^j) / (partial tilde(x)^b) (partial x^k) / (partial tilde(x)^c) (partial x^l) / (partial tilde(x)^d) (partial L) / (partial w_(a b c d)) (tilde(g)_(i j), tilde(g)_(i j, k), tilde(g)_(i j, k l)) $

*Expression 5.* The following expression is taken from a source-backed formula corpus.

$ q^Q product_(k=1)^(Q-1) (q z_i - z_k) / (z_i - q z_k) = ((z_i - i tau kappa lambda^(-1/2) q^(1/2)) (z_i + i kappa lambda^(1/2) q^(1/2))) / ((q^(1/2) z_i + i tau kappa lambda^(-1/2)) (q^(1/2) z_i - i kappa lambda^(1/2))) $
